meta.title: The Argument at the Next Table

messages.text: This conflict behind me... I can't un-hear it.
My novel is suddenly very uninteresting.
I can't focus on anything except the voices.

messages.name: Anna
messages.text: Sousuke. Do you understand what I'm saying?

messages.name: Sousuke
messages.text: Anna, just... wait.

messages.name: Anna
messages.text: Wait? Hana's flight is TONIGHT. If you don't go now she'll leave thinking you don't care!
Hana. Kuremiya Hana. Transfer student. Arrived in May.
Instantly the most talked-about person in our grade.
She's leaving? Already?

messages.name: Sousuke
messages.text: She said goodbye. With a smile. There's no point.

messages.name: Anna
messages.text: ...you dense idiot.
Agreed.

messages.name: Anna
messages.text: She's not the type to confront people about what she wants.

messages.name: Anna
messages.text: She smiles. Says it's fine. Then cries alone.

messages.name: Anna
messages.text: You've been making her laugh since she got here. Day one. Remember?

messages.name: Anna
messages.text: You called her out during self-intros. Whatever that was about.

messages.name: Sousuke
messages.text: She thought I groped her on the train. I wasn't.

messages.name: Anna
messages.text: POINT IS. She likes you. It's so evident a stranger on the street could tell.

messages.name: Anna
messages.text: And you like her too.

messages.name: Sousuke
messages.text: ...Yeah. I do.

messages.name: Anna
messages.text: Then go.

messages.name: Anna
messages.text: Don't abandon this because you're scared.

messages.name: Sousuke
messages.text: But you and I... we've always been...

messages.name: Anna
messages.text: We were kids, Sousuke.

messages.name: Anna
messages.text: What matters is right in front of you.

messages.name: Anna
messages.text: Go get her. That's an order from your childhood friend.
Booth creaks. Footsteps.

messages.name: Sousuke
messages.text: ...Thank you, Anna.
Door swings shut. Silence. Heavy silence.
I don't dare breathe.
Whatever comes next... was never meant to have an audience.

messages.name: Anna
messages.text: Don't apologize, you idiot.
Those words. Not meant for anyone. But I heard.
And then — the sound of a glass being lifted.
